rules.rule: every generation request MUST be reviewer-authored and reviewer-attributed.
every generation request MUST cite a grounding_id, prompt_id, synthesis_id, canonical_product_id.
autonomous (LLM- or agent-driven) generation requests are FORBIDDEN.
the runtime does NOT execute generation; it records the reviewer-authored request and the out-of-band reviewer-supplied output.
generation requests are append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
reviewer-declared variant_count MUST be >= 1 and bounded by reviewer-set ceiling.
every generation request MUST declare expected asset_kind ∈ ASSET_KINDS.
